links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-billed tit-tyrant (Anairetes flavirostris) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Peru, and as a vagrant in Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: cuzcoensis is known only in Peru's Cuzco Department but its range might extend north to Junín Department. In addition, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has records showing the nominate subspecies as a vagrant in Uruguay. The yellow-billed tit-tyrant inhabits a variety of dryish semi-open to open landscapes
